mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pfw_transaction_log ( LOG_DATE, TRANSACTION_ID, TRACE_ID, SPAN_ID, PARENT_SPAN_ID, SEQUENCE_NO, MODULE_ID, MENU_ID, BUSINESS_TRANSACTION_ID, BUSINESS_TRANSACTION_NAME, LOG_TYPE, API_VERSION, CLIENT_APP_ID, CLIENT_VERSION, CALLER_SERVICE, CALLER_INSTANCE_ID, CORRELATION_ID, IDEMPOTENCY_KEY, LOCALE, TIMEZONE, REQUEST_TYPE, ORIGINAL_CHANNEL_CODE, CHANNEL_CODE, MEMBER_NO, CUSTOMER_NO, SCREEN_ID, DEVICE_ID, CLIENT_REQUEST_TIME, WAS_ID, SERVER_INSTANCE_ID, HOST_NAME, PROCESS_ID, THREAD_NAME, RESERVED_FIELD_1, RESERVED_FIELD_2, RESERVED_FIELD_3, RESERVED_FIELD_4, RESERVED_FIELD_5, HTTP_METHOD, URI, CONTROLLER, EXECUTION_PACKAGE, EXECUTION_CLASS, EXECUTION_METHOD, EXECUTION_SIGNATURE, WORKFLOW_ID, WORKFLOW_NAME, WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID, WORKFLOW_STEP_ID, WORKFLOW_STEP_NAME, WORKFLOW_STATUS, WORKFLOW_FAILURE_POLICY, COMPENSATION_YN, COMPENSATION_TRANSACTION_ID, COMPENSATION_TARGET_TRANSACTION_ID, COMPENSATION_STATUS, PARAMETERS, REQUEST_BODY, RESPONSE, HTTP_STATUS, RESPONSE_CODE, MESSAGE_CODE, MESSAGE_CONTENT, ERROR_MESSAGE, ERROR_CODE, EXTERNAL_MESSAGE, INTERNAL_MESSAGE, EXEC_USER, CLIENT_IP, USER_AGENT, START_TIME, END_TIME, DURATION_MS, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( IFNULL(DATE(#{startTime}), CURDATE()), #{transactionId}, #{traceId}, #{spanId}, #{parentSpanId}, #{sequenceNo}, IFNULL(#{moduleId}, 'N/A'), #{menuId}, #{businessTransactionId}, #{businessTransactionName}, IFNULL(#{logType}, 'N/A'), #{apiVersion}, #{clientAppId}, #{clientVersion}, #{callerService}, #{callerInstanceId}, #{correlationId}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{locale}, #{timezone}, #{requestType}, #{originalChannelCode}, #{channelCode}, #{memberNo}, #{customerNo}, #{screenId}, #{deviceId}, #{clientRequestTime}, #{wasId}, #{serverInstanceId}, #{hostName}, #{processId}, #{threadName}, #{reservedField1}, #{reservedField2}, #{reservedField3}, #{reservedField4}, #{reservedField5}, #{httpMethod}, IFNULL(#{uri}, 'N/A'), #{controller}, #{executionPackage}, #{executionClass}, #{executionMethod}, #{executionSignature}, #{workflowId}, #{workflowName}, #{workflowInstanceId}, #{workflowStepId}, #{workflowStepName}, #{workflowStatus}, #{workflowFailurePolicy}, IFNULL(#{compensationYn}, 'N'), #{compensationTransactionId}, #{compensationTargetTransactionId}, #{compensationStatus}, #{parameters}, #{requestBody}, #{response}, #{httpStatus}, #{responseCode}, #{messageCode}, #{messageContent}, #{errorMessage}, #{errorCode}, #{externalMessage}, #{internalMessage}, IFNULL(#{execUser}, 'N/A'), #{clientIp}, #{userAgent}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{durationMs}, IFNULL(NULLIF(#{execUser}, 'N/A'), 'PFW'), NOW(), IFNULL(NULLIF(#{execUser}, 'N/A'), 'PFW'), NOW() )

INSERT INTO pfw_transaction_log_detail ( LOG_IDX, DETAIL_KEY, DETAIL_VALUE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{logIdx}, IFNULL(#{detailKey}, 'N/A'), IFNULL(#{detailValue}, 'N/A'), IFNULL(NULLIF(#{auditUser}, 'N/A'), 'PFW'), NOW(), IFNULL(NULLIF(#{auditUser}, 'N/A'), 'PFW'), NOW() )
